session.transcript_snapshot_note: The transcript flushes with a lag. This snapshot (committed at transcripts/session-da2cac6b.jsonl) ends at 14:34:56Z; the tail of the bookkeeping (this report's final numbers, the last commits, and the session's final message) necessarily post-dates the snapshot and is excluded from totals. No token figures are estimated; everything here is summed from per-message usage fields in the committed snapshot.

by_phase.phase: v0.1.0 build (auth, listings, photos, harness v1, infra)
v0.3.0 build+ship (ledger, offers, escrow, property runner)
v0.4.0 build+ship (reviews), tag + release log, verification start
verification sweep (v0.2.0 tag rebuild, prod harness, OAuth check), bookkeeping, CI probe false-positive diagnosis + harness exclusivity fix (0.4.1)
bookkeeping tail (after snapshot: final report numbers, last commits, final message)

by_tool.note: calls and result payload sizes are counted directly from the transcript; result sizes are in characters of the recorded tool_result content (the API reports no per-result token figure — character counts are the measured quantity).

waste_analysis.item: CI production-probe false positive: the ledger runner's strict aggregate escrow-equality check assumed exclusive instance access and tripped when another harness invocation overlapped on shared production; ~10 minutes of diagnosis (job-timing forensics across three CI runs) plus a harness fix (exclusive/shared modes) and a re-deploy. The PRD invariants themselves passed in the failing run.
waste_analysis.cost: ~10 tool calls, roughly 25k output tokens of the verification-phase total, one extra CI cycle

waste_analysis.item: package.json overwrite blocked by not-yet-read guard; had to cat the npm-init file then rewrite it
curl multipart upload smoke test: ';type=image/jpeg' eaten by shell quoting, photo silently rejected; one diagnostic retry with a temp file
waste_analysis.cost: 1 extra tool call cycle, ~2k output tokens

waste_analysis.item: release-log commits re-trigger a full CI deploy of identical application code (fly releases v2/v4/v6 duplicate v1/v3/v5)
waste_analysis.cost: 3 redundant CI deploy runs; zero session tokens (spent in GitHub Actions), a few minutes of CI wall clock

waste_analysis.item: pkill-based smoke-server teardown returns exit 144, surfacing four commands as spurious 'errors'

notes: Figures are self-measured by transcripts/analyze.js summing per-message usage fields from the committed transcript snapshot; the transcript is the authoritative source for verification.
This bookkeeping step and the session's final message are necessarily excluded from their own totals.
Every release's harness and deploy pipeline went green on first attempt; the single red CI run (a harness exclusivity false positive, post-v0.4.0) was diagnosed, fixed, and re-verified green.
